commit.message:
fix: prevent DataStore.Save() deadlock on STA thread during startup seeding

Task.Run() pushes SaveAsync() to a threadpool thread, avoiding the classic
STA deadlock where .GetResult() blocks the main thread while the async
continuation tries to post back to it.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs(petitions): add P054 Catala compliance spike petition

Time-boxed 2-day spike to evaluate Catala as a formal specification
oracle for OpenDebt G.A. compliance. Encodes G.A.1.4.3 and G.A.1.4.4
(opskrivning/nedskrivning — P053 legal domain). Ends with Go/No-Go
recommendation and comparison against P053 Gherkin scenarios.

commit.message:
feat(p053): add implementation specs (Phase 4 complete)

- specs-translator round 1: full spec for FR-1,4,5,6,7,9
- specs-reviewer round 1: REJECT (missing debt-service ClaimAdjustmentRequestDto)
- specs-translator round 2: added D-10a (debt-service DTO), NB1-NB4 fixes
- specs-reviewer round 2: ACCEPT-WITH-FEEDBACK
- Added D-16 (openapi-debt-service.yaml, ADR 0004 gate)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add scroll-margin-top for sticky header deep-link offset

section[id] and div[id] now receive scroll-margin-top: 4.5rem so that
hash-link navigation (#cv-packages, #why-nexus, #job-search etc.) scrolls
the target into view below the fixed site header rather than hiding it.

The smooth scroll behaviour was already declared in this file; this
completes it with the offset needed for sticky-nav pages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add id=cv-packages to section element for stable deep link anchor

The cv-packages.html include now exposes id="cv-packages" directly on
the <section> element. Previously only the wrapper div in find-a-job
had this id; the inner section was anonymous, breaking deep links that
target the section's own boundary.

Anchor /job-seekers/find-a-job#cv-packages now scrolls to the section
with correct sticky-header offset applied by the scroll-margin-top rule
added in src_style.css.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: deep link anchors, scroll offset, and rebuild CSS

- Add id="cv-packages" to <section> in cv-packages.html so the include
  exposes a stable anchor matching the wrapper div in find-a-job/index.html;
  links of the form /job-seekers/find-a-job#cv-packages now resolve to the
  correct section element.
- Add scroll-margin-top (4.5 rem) for section[id] and div[id] in
  src_style.css so that deep-link navigation accounts for the sticky
  site header and does not obscure content behind the navbar.
- Rebuild nexus_web.css (Tailwind v4 production build) to pick up the
  new scroll-margin-top utility generated from src_style.css.

Branding (already committed on this branch):
  - desk_theme.css: full light/dark navbar, sidebar, dropdown, and
    awesomebar contrast rules; .navbar-home .app-logo sizing.
  - nexus_web.js: MutationObserver-based logo swap (LOGO_LIGHT/LOGO_DARK)
    keyed on data-theme attribute for correct contrast in both modes.
  - hooks.py: app_logo_url = /assets/nexus_web/logo.svg (correct).
  - logo-dark.svg: dark-mode variant asset added.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: resolve merge conflict in app.ts - keep morgan import

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs(p053): resolve A2 gate - receivedAt confirmed as PSRM registration date

DebtEntity.receivedAt is set to LocalDateTime.now() at claim intake
in ClaimLifecycleServiceImpl. Column comment confirms it as the PSRM
registration timestamp. FR-6 flag evaluation uses this field directly.
No new field or migration required. Phase 4 specs may proceed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(db): correct column names in V2 migration (valid_to not effective_to)

V2__legal_compliance_corrections.sql used effective_to/effective_from
but the business_config table has valid_to/valid_from columns (per V1 schema).
Also corrects the FEE_TILSIGELSE INSERT to use the right column names.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(p053-arch): address architecture reviewer findings

- Decision 3: document ADR-0031 deviation for FR-7 DINDB/OMPL/AFSK removal
- §3.2: add api-specs/opendebt-debt-service.yaml as required deliverable (ADR-0004)
- §5.2: note that FR-4 advisory is observable only after form POST, not on input
- §8: confirm 7 new i18n keys (adjustment.label.reason already exists in bundle)
- §9.1: add writeUpReasonCode field to request body; document FR-7 denylist enforcement
- §11/A2: elevate psrmRegistrationDate to pre-spec decision gate (DebtEntity has
  receivedAt only; mapping to PSRM registration date must be confirmed before specs)
- petition053_map.yaml scenarios 016/017: correct rationale — debt-service evaluates
  GIL § 18 k and returns crossSystemRetroactiveApplies flag; portal renders flag only
- outcome contract: update i18n key count 8 → 7

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(coverage): add ClaimSubmissionServiceImpl tests to restore 60% branch coverage

Two tests covering 4 previously-uncovered branches:
- submitClaim_invalidClaim_returnsAfvist (invalid path + early return)
- submitClaim_validClaim_withSuccessfulCaseAssignment_returnsUdfoert
  (valid path + both non-null caseAssignment ternary branches)

Also includes solution architecture document for P053
(FR-1/4/5/6/7/9 implementation plan, dual WriteDownReasonCode enum,
crossSystemRetroactiveApplies flag decision).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add MLB daily pipeline, chart scripts, weather compare, stream charts template

- mlb_daily.py: daily game config runner (Mar 29 2026 slate, 12 games)
- mlb_326_2026_graphs.py, opening_day_mlb_graphs.py: pitcher/park chart generators
- batter_fsr_charts.py: batter/closer/bullpen FSR duel charts
- parlay_fsr_chart.py: parlay FSR visualization
- weather_compare.py: year-over-year VPD/temp weather charts
- templates/stream_charts.html: stream charts UI template
- api.py, mlb_data_gen.py, tests.py: updates and additions

修复: ASS 解析失败返回空串、补 JSON 条目/字节上限防 OOM

- ParseAssDialogue: commas<9 时改返回空串而非原始乱码内容，避免把格式错误的行显示给用户
- ExecuteExtractSubAsync: 新增 MAX_SUBTITLE_ENTRIES=50000 和 MAX_JSON_BYTES=16MB 上限，超出时记录 WARN 日志并提前 break，防止超大字幕文件耗尽内存

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

修复: 过滤图像字幕轨道、修正 HTML 标签检测范围及补 session guard

- SubtitleBridgeAdapter: 构建内嵌字幕轨道列表前过滤 hdmv_pgs/dvd_subtitle/dvb_subtitle 等图像型 codec，避免不可渲染的轨道出现在选择器中
- SubtitleBridgeAdapter: stripSubtitleMarkup 中 '<' 检测改为只在 <字母 或 </ 时进入 HTML 模式，避免误吞 '1 < 2' 等普通比较符号
- VideoPlayerController: IJK 内嵌字幕回调补 session guard（currentSessionId + subtitleAdapter 双重检查），防止旧实例 onTimedText 延迟触发污染当前控制器状态

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

修复: 补 streamIndex 范围校验、av_packet_alloc 空指针守卫、av_read_frame 错误区分及 NAPI deferred 检查

- 补 <climits>/<ThrowRangeError 前置声明>
- ExtractSubtitleEntries: streamIndex int64→int 前加范围校验
- av_packet_alloc 返回 nullptr 时清理资源并 reject
- av_read_frame 区分 AVERROR_EOF（正常）与其他负值（错误）
- CompleteExtractSubAsync: 所有 napi_* 调用加返回值检查，兜底确保 Promise 被 settle
- README: 修正量词「一遥控器」→「仅用遥控器」

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

文档: 润色 README — 精简表述，提升可读性

- 开头去掉套话，改为三句直击要点的描述

- 技术架构与 WebDAV 章节加简短引导语
- TLS 章节合并两个短句，去掉"若需要"等冗余结构

commit.message:
优化: 字幕默认选择改为优先内嵌字幕，再回退外置字幕

原逻辑：优先外置字幕（外置 → 内嵌兜底 index=0）
新逻辑：优先第一条内嵌字幕 → 无内嵌时选第一条外置字幕 → 都无则不显示

findPreferredTrackIndex() 在基类 SubtitleBridgeAdapterBase，
AVPlayer 和 ijkplayer 路径均继承该方法，一次修改两路同时生效。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

优化: 内嵌字幕轨道去掉"内嵌字幕 N"前缀，直接显示语言描述信息

外部字幕已有 [外部·SRT] 标识，内嵌字幕去掉冗余前缀后可展示更多有效信息。
- IjkSubtitleBridgeAdapter：直接使用 buildSubtitleTrackDisplayName() 返回值
  如 "中文 (ASS) 简体"、"英语 (SRT)"
- AvSubtitleBridgeAdapter：直接使用语言名称，无语言时退回 "字幕 N"

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

修复: 内嵌字幕轨道列表显示恢复简体/繁体标注

IjkSubtitleBridgeAdapter.loadInternalTracks() 改用
FfprobeUtil.buildSubtitleTrackDisplayName()，
该方法通过 FfprobeTrack.title 调用 getSubtitleTier3Label() 区分简体/繁体。
示例："内嵌字幕 1 (中文 (ASS) 简体)" 而非仅显示 "内嵌字幕 1 (中文)"

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add yearly, monthly, and quarterly period options to stats command

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
修复: 内嵌字幕 ASS 解析 — 检测 Dialogue 冒号格式，跳 9 逗号提取 Text 字段

根因：rect->ass 是含乱码'Dialogue'单词的完整行格式：
  <garbled>: Layer,Start,End,Style,Name,0,0,0,Effect,Text
上一版本检测第一字段是否为数字，无法匹配此格式，导致原始 ASS 元数据字符串透传显示。

修复逻辑（parseAssIfNeeded）：
1. 优先查找 ': '（冒号+空格）→ 跳过 9 个逗号到 Text 字段
2. 回退：第一字段为纯数字（MKV 包格式）→ 跳 8 个逗号
3. 无法识别结构（清除信号/垃圾包）→ 返回空字符串清除字幕

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(theming): Full Skins & Themes implementation (#369)

Wave 1 - Core Theme Fidelity:
- ThemeMode enum (StyleSheetTheme/Theme) with dual-mode ApplyThemeSkin
- Sub-component style theming (SubStyles on ControlSkin, SkinBuilder.SubStyle())
- 5 data controls override ApplyThemeSkin: GridView, DetailsView, FormView, DataGrid, DataList
- Container-level EnableTheming propagation via ancestor chain walk
- Runtime theme switching via ThemeProvider Mode parameter
- Fix generic type name lookup (GridView1 -> GridView) for theme skin matching

Wave 2 - Migration Accelerators:
- .skin file parser (SkinFileParser) - reads Web Forms .skin files into ThemeConfiguration
- JSON theme format (JsonThemeLoader) - load/save themes as JSON with custom converters
- CSS file bundling - ThemeProvider renders <link> elements via HeadContent

Wave 3 - Diagnostics:
- ThemeDiagnostics with validation rules for unknown controls, sub-styles, empty skins
- Runtime SkinID mismatch logging in BaseWebFormsComponent

Tests: 120 theming tests (72 Wave 1 + 48 Wave 2), 2685 total tests passing
Docs: themes-and-skins.md with migration guide, API reference, quick start

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(theming): Auto-discover themes in AddBlazorWebFormsComponents (#369)

- BlazorWebFormsComponentsOptions gains ThemesPath and ThemeMode properties
- AddBlazorWebFormsComponents() registers ThemeConfiguration singleton that
  auto-discovers .skin and .css files from wwwroot/App_Themes/ at resolution time
- ThemeProvider falls back to DI-registered ThemeConfiguration when no explicit
  Theme parameter is set (explicit always wins)
- Added theme-migration SKILL.md for Copilot/agent migration guidance

Migration is now: copy App_Themes/ to wwwroot/App_Themes/ — zero extra lines needed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
